CREATE TABLE test_div (x FLOAT, y FLOAT);
SELECT sql_div(y, x) FROM test_div WHERE x > 0;
CREATE TABLE div_results AS SELECT sql_div(x, y) AS div_result FROM test_div;
SELECT sql_div((SELECT SUM(a) FROM t1), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1)) AS avg_div FROM t1;
SELECT sql_div((SELECT AVG(c) FROM t2), (SELECT MIN(c) FROM t2)) AS complex_div;
